title: leymus angustus
intro: Leymus angustus, also known as blue grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Great Plains of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Leymus angustus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
